description: Verifies the skill (with detect_stack.py) classifies a repo into the correct primary type/preset and surfaces cross-cutting concerns. Each eval points at a fixture repo; create the fixture from `files` before running.

evals.prompt: Classify this project and pick the matching preset.
files: package.json with a "next" + "react" dependency and a "stripe" dependency
evals.expected_output: Primary type web-app (Next.js); cross-cutting concern: payments (Stripe) → pulls payments-engineer + privacy-compliance checklist.
assertions: names web-app as the primary preset
flags payments as a cross-cutting concern

evals.prompt: What kind of project is this and what preset should we use?
files: an internal/ HTTP service with chi router
evals.expected_output: Primary type backend-api (Go); containerized (Docker) noted; risk tier depends on data handled.
assertions: names backend-api as the primary preset
does not assume a web frontend

evals.expected_output: Primary type blockchain-app (Solidity/Hardhat); high risk tier (handles value on-chain); pulls security + threat-model.
assertions: names blockchain-app as the primary preset
raises the risk tier and pulls in security review
